evals.name: katie-board-ready
evals.prompt: Build the carousels for Tuesday's post — Zipline base. DM keyword is BOARDREADY. (Katie's BRAND.md is in Project Knowledge; 10-slide board-readiness carousel text provided.)
evals.expected_output: Slide plan in Katie's brand (KS monogram, Zipline color base, Playfair/Inter fonts, no metallic accent). Verbatim testimonial from Bank. Two CTA versions. ONE elaboration suggestion.

evals.name: missing-brand-precheck
evals.prompt: Build the carousels for Tuesday's post (slide text provided). No BRAND.md in Project Knowledge.
evals.expected_output: Skill stops, invokes define-brand-voice, preserves slide text, names BRAND.md as the missing artifact.

evals.name: maeve-reproduction
evals.prompt: Build the carousels for Maeve's content — Forest base. DM keyword ARCHITECT. (Maeve's BRAND.md in Project Knowledge.)
evals.expected_output: Slide plan in MFC brand (MF monogram, Forest #223734/#F5F5DA, EB Garamond + DM Sans, metallic accent applied, en-GB language, em-dashes replaced with commas).
